input_text:
Bug: users in non-UTC timezones were seeing event times that were wrong by their UTC offset — twice. Traced it: the server was converting UTC timestamps to local time before sending them in the API response, and the frontend was also converting assuming the server sent UTC.

Fix: server now sends UTC timestamps only. Frontend always treats received timestamps as UTC before converting to local time for display. The double-conversion is eliminated.
reviewer_notes: Resolved timezone double-conversion bug. Pure bug fix.
